methods: for_school(school) - returns queryset filtered to a specific school

models.name: AcademicSession
overridden_methods: save - ensures only one is_current per school

models.name: Term
overridden_methods: save - ensures only one is_current per school

models.name: ClassEnrollment
overridden_methods: save - ensures only one is_current per student

querysets.name: ScoreQuerySet
methods: visible_to_user(user) - role-based filtering (admins/teachers see all; students/parents see only published)

models.name: Score
properties: total_score - sum of test_1 + test_2 + test_3 + exam_score (treats None as 0)
is_complete - True if all 4 scores are not None

models.name: Invoice
properties: amount_paid - Sum of confirmed payment amounts (aggregate query)
status - returns PAID (balance <= 0), PARTIAL (amount_paid > 0), or UNPAID

models.name: Payment
methods: clean() - validates reference is required for PAYSTACK method

models.name: AllowanceDefinition
methods: clean() - validates XOR: exactly one of pay_grade or target_staff must be set

models.name: DeductionDefinition
methods: clean() - validates XOR: exactly one of pay_grade or target_staff must be set

models.name: PayrollRun
properties: total_gross_pay - Sum of all payslips.gross_pay in this run
total_net_pay - Sum of all payslips.net_pay in this run
total_disbursed - Sum of CONFIRMED SalaryDisbursement amounts for this run
staff_count - count of payslips in this run

models.name: Payslip
properties: amount_disbursed - Sum of CONFIRMED SalaryDisbursement amounts for this payslip
disbursement_status - returns UNPAID, PARTIAL, or PAID based on amount_disbursed vs net_pay

models.name: Project
properties: spent - Sum of all Expenditure.amount for this project

patterns: All concrete models except School, InvoiceLineItem, PayslipLineItem use TenantScopedModel
School is the root non-scoped tenant model; all others carry school FK via TenantScopedModel abstraction
XOR pattern on AllowanceDefinition and DeductionDefinition: pay_grade XOR target_staff
Role validation via clean(): guardian.role==PARENT, teacher.role==TEACHER, student.user.role==STUDENT
is_current boolean + overridden save() to enforce single-current per scope: AcademicSession, Term, ClassEnrollment
InvoiceLineItem and PayslipLineItem are plain models (not tenant-scoped), always accessed through scoped parent
Property-based computed statuses on Invoice, Payslip, PayrollRun (not stored in DB)
Score uses custom ScoreQuerySet with visible_to_user() role-aware filtering
Payment.Status mirrors SalaryDisbursement.Status: PENDING -> CONFIRMED/FAILED lifecycle
Every model uses gettext_lazy for translatable verbose_name
